doc_title: Age Discrimination in Employment Act — EEOC Compliance Manual
label: fabricated
reason: Section 8 of the EEOC Compliance Manual is officially titled "Retaliation," and the provided text uses modern phrasing not present in formal agency guidance.
response_turn1:
